description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a rectangular floor plan, surrounded on one side by a dense row of tall evergreen trees. The house features a flat roof and a modern, minimalist exterior with clean white walls and several windows distributed along the facade. The interior layout is visible from above, showing multiple rooms, including what appears to be bedrooms, bathrooms, a kitchen, and a living area, all organized around a central hallway. The windows are arranged in a simple, functional pattern, and the main entryway is located on the longer side of the building, facing the tree line. The house is set in a suburban or semi-urban context, with the trees providing privacy and a natural barrier. The overall design is practical and contemporary, with an emphasis on open, accessible living spaces.
description: A modern, single-story rectangular house with a flat roof, white exterior, and a row of tall evergreen trees along one side. The layout is open and functional, with multiple rooms and a simple window arrangement.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full house layout and the dense row of evergreen trees adjacent to the building.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway, white facade, and the alignment of windows facing the trees.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the house, the proximity of the trees, and the arrangement of rooms inside.
description_view_3: Rear view with the back wall of the house, fewer visible windows, and the tree line providing a backdrop.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door on the long side, flush with the facade, no porch or steps, minimalistic design
